programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, basketball great Metta World Peace joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to talk about what it means to play "Metta Ball," having a job when you're "Here For The Discount,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 806
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, business guru Marcus Lemonis shows us his "Lemonis Face", teaches us the 3Ps of "People, Process, Pain" and finally discovers that "They Do Exist!".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 19
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness singer/songwriter/producer Mike Posner joins Rob, Steelo and Chanel to take TOO MANY PILLS, explore some BROMANTIC BONDS and learn about WHITE GIRL PROBLEMS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 25
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo celebrate summer vacation by getting SAND BLASTED, take a trip to PAINLAND and party with THE BANG GANG.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 5
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, hip hop producer and hit maker DJ Mustard joins Rob, Steelo, and Chanel to put MUSTARD ON EVERYTHING, suffer through a COLD SUMMER, and celebrate the greatest HEY MAKERS of all time.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 820
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling take the "Running Man Challenge," explore the fear known as "Crap-nophobia" and learn what it means to be "Saved To Death."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 24
programme.desc: On an all-new remix episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Steelo swap places as Chanel teaches that CUTE KILLS, Steelo warns about DEATH CARTS and Rob shows how people get down with PPP

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 19
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, hip hop legend DJ Paul joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to get a little ZAP HAPPY, live the JUGG LIFE, and get energized by some BEATSPIRATION.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 17
programme.desc: On a special episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling and Chanel get down with the bros as they view the world in BRO-MOTION, learn what it means to be BRO-PROOF, and study the special bro bond IN BRO WE TRUST.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 717
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy-winning producer and DJ, Diplo, joins Rob, Chanel, and Sterling save the day with "Peacekeepers," get crazy with "Mad Indecent Block Parties,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 812
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling spot some "Man Dolphins", hit some red "Bullseyes" and get wet in the category "Dammmmp Daniel."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 11
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel celebrate the holiday season by fighting through BLACK AND BLUE FRIDAY, GETTIN' UGLY with Christmas sweaters, and spinning some HUMAN DREIDELS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 809
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo fly solo as they learn how dangerous it is to be born with "Turtle Blood", get in shape with "Beast 90x" and learn the advantages to being 100% "Prank Proof".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 16
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo choke down some STREET MEAT, party with a few SLITER SISTERS and hit the stairs with some extreme SLINKIES.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 724
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling have rapper/producer Sage the Gemini on the show to find out if he's "Glide Or Die," get "Over Gassed," and announce to the world "I Love Sparks!"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 821
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, comedy icon Wanda Sykes joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to talk about what it means to have "Unpresidential Nipples," doling out "Momforcement," and the first-ever "Wandamania."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 810

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 21

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The boys find out that the joys of playing Airsoft come with the challenges of dealing with teenagers.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Butters is shocked to learn that people in South Park don't understand what St. Patrick's Day is really about.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Cartman Gets An Anal Probe: Cartman dreams he has a close encounter with an alien. The other boys are convinced the dream was real, and that he has been the victim of an alien anal probe. (S1, E01)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When Cartman's environmental essay wins a national contest, America's sweetheart, Kathie Lee Gifford, comes to South Park to present the award.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A weekend trip to experience the finer points of camping, fishing and blowing animals to smithereens is threatened by an erupting volcano.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: An Elephant Makes Love To A Pig: Kyle calls in genetic engineer Dr. Mephisto to crossbreed his pet elephant and Cartman's pot-bellied pig in a bid to win a science competition. (S1, E05)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Death: Stan's ancient grandfather attempts to trick the boys into killing him. Meanwhile, the parents of South Park lobby a TV network to rid the airwaves of Terrance and Phillip. (S1, E06)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A mishap at the morgue transforms the residents of South Park into brain-eating zombies and threatens the boys night of Trick-or-Treating.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Thanksgiving Episode- Mistaking Cartman for a starving African child, government authorities send him to Ethiopia where he runs into Sally Struthers.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Mr Hankey, The Christmas Poo: The Mayor decides to impose a holiday theme which won't offend anybody. Kyle tries to convince everyone that Mr Hankey (a singing Christmas poo) exists. (S1, E09)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Damien: The new kid in class persuades Jesus to do battle with his father, Satan, in the final battle of good versus evil. Cartman is livid to learn the bout clashes with his birthday. (S1, E10)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Tom's Rhinoplasty: The boys become lesbians to impress a new teacher, making Wendy jealous. Also, to his delight, Mr. Garrison's plastic surgery leaves him looking like David Hasselhoff. (S1, E11)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Mecha-Streisand: Cartman and Kyle fall out over a magic triangle they un-earth on an archaeological dig. The triangle yields the power to turn Barbra Streisand into a terrible monster. (S1, E12)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Cartman's Mum Is A Dirty S**t (1): Dr. Mephisto helps Cartman un-cover the truth about his dad's identity. The spotlight is on quite a few of South Park's male residents. Who could it be? (S1, E13)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Cartman's Mum Is Still A Dirty S**t (2): Dr Mephisto is shot before he reveals who Cartman's father is. Who exactly shot him? Meanwhile, the rest of the town try to deal with a blizzard. (S2, E02)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When Barbrady resigns, anarchy ensues and the boys pitch in to help.

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Ike's Wee Wee: Kyle misunderstands what circumcision is and thinks he has to save Ike's penis from being cut off! Mr. Mackey is fired, and turns to drugs - "drugs are bad, m'kay?" (S2, E04)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Conjoined Fetus Lady: Kyle is terrified because he has to see the school nurse, who has a scary deformity. Meanwhile, the school dodgeball team goes to China - only Pip can save them now. (S2, E05)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: City On The Edge Of Forever: The school bus ends up perched on the edge of a ravine after it crashes in a snowstorm. Must be time for some flashbacks then! Can these memories be trusted? (S2, E07)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Summer Sucks: The boys' plans for 4th of July celebrations are ruined when the State bans fireworks. It's up to Uncle Jimbo and Ned to save the day with a little trip down Meheeco way. (S2, E08)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Chef's Chocolate Salty Balls: The Sundance Film Festival is in South Park but it's not long before Hollywood culture is over running the town and polluting the sewer where Mr Hankey lives. (S2, E09)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Chickenpox: The boys are sent to Kenny's for the night, so they can all get chickenpox. The boys decide to get even on their parents by hiring a prostitute with mouth herpes to infect them. (S2, E10)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Roger Ebert Should Lay Off The Fatty Foods: The boys are taken to the planetarium but Cartman has other ideas and decides to audition to sing the Cheesy Poofs song on their next advert. (S2, E11)

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Bob is distraught because a thirty-something guy at his gym died while on the treadmill, and he's certain that he's headed for the same fate.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Becker is upset when a patient substitutes his Christian Science faith for medical treatment.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 15
programme.desc: John helps his elderly neighbor, Mrs. Firth, get into her apartment and she repays him by making homemade chicken noodle soup.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 16
programme.desc: John's at the end of his rope with his hectic practice and makes a call, which Linda overhears, telling the person on the other end that he can't take another day.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 17
programme.desc: When a customer leaves the diner because of John's cigarette smoke, Chris puts her foot down and tells him that it is now a "smoke-free" restaurant.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 18
programme.desc: John arrives at the diner and announces that he has quit smoking.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 19
programme.desc: John walks into the diner and sees Chris, Bob, and Jake standing around a booth.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 20
programme.desc: The fire marshal threatens to fine Chris for a faulty sprinkler system at the diner, but Chris flirts her way out of it.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Chris' ex-husband, Roger, is in town and comes to the diner to see her.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 22
programme.desc: John has a dream that he and Chris kissed each other. At the office, Linda is late and tells Margaret it's because her cab got hit by a runaway hotdog cart.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Highlights from last season include Chris and John exchanging "I love yous" as Chris is wheeled into surgery for an appendectomy.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 2
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake bemoans his poor financial status, and Hector proposes that he participates in a drug-testing program to earn money.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Chris and John have their first impromptu date, but Chris wants something more formal before taking the relationship any further, and tells John so.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 4
programme.desc: John takes Chris out for their first official date - to a cheap Chinese restaurant. both are excited about the possibility of their "first time."

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 5
programme.desc: As John and Chris get more serious in their relationship, Chris realizes that John is not as affectionate as she'd like him to be.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 6
programme.desc: At the diner, Hector tries to talk Jake into giving him money to invest in coffee futures, but Jake resists.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 7
programme.desc: It's Thanksgiving and Chris wants to make dinner for John, who is totally against holidays.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 8
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake receives a letter and is shocked to find out that his late grandmother has left him $25,000.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Margaret tells John that a letter for a medical conference has arrived, but John scoffs, saying it's just an excuse for doctors to have a weekend in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Chris, Jake, Hector, and Linda are at the diner. Chris serves Linda her breakfast as John walks in and tells Linda that she needs to get to the office and help Margaret.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 11
programme.desc: At the diner, Chris and Jake complain about the cold weather when John walks in, happy because it's cold and flu season, which means more patients.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 12
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake is looking for someone to go downtown and pick up Stevie Wonder concert tickets for him with no luck.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Chris fears that John is going to break up with her after he invites her to dinner at a nice restaurant with no explanation.

programme.title: Reckless Abandon
programme.desc: Amy’s attempts to help Georgie deal with an impending departure are complicated by Olivia.

programme.title: A Matter of Trust
programme.desc: Amy and Ty work together to determine why Caleb’s horse becomes ill during his treatment at Heartland.

programme.title: Darkness Before Dawn
programme.desc: Georgie begins to second-guess her decision to run away, while the family bands together to find her.

programme.title: Making the Grade
programme.desc: Ty gets roped into helping Jack and Tim on a cattle drive but an unforeseen accident jeopardizes their plans.

programme.title: The Real Deal
programme.desc: Tim seeks Amy and Georgie’s help to discourage Jade from accepting a shady sponsorship deal.

programme.title: Risky Business
programme.desc: Amy and Cass work together to save a racehorse with a career-ending condition.

programme.title: No Regrets
programme.desc: Georgie’s school project on Val Stanton inspires her to take a risk with Adam.

programme.title: Making a Move
programme.desc: When Lou returns from New York there's a new ranch hand and food truck that is threatening Maggie’s business.

programme.title: Pandora’s Box
programme.desc: Lou finds herself trapped at the Dude Ranch with Mitch, the new ranch hand.

programme.title: Love Is Just a Word
programme.desc: While helping Cass handle a spirited horse, Amy learns there is more riding on their success than she realized

programme.title: Resolutions
programme.desc: When their plans to get away are thwarted, Amy and Ty celebrate their first anniversary closer to home.

programme.title: There Will Be Changes
programme.desc: As Amy and Ty prepare for parenthood, they work together to resolve a dangerous pregnancy issue.

programme.title: You Just Know
programme.desc: Ty performs life-saving surgery on a mare, while the family works around-the-clock to bottle feed the foals.

programme.title: New Kid in Town
programme.desc: Tim is caught in the middle of Jade’s showdown with a new hotshot bronc rider.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 32
programme.desc: The women agree to lift the barricade and end the hunger strike.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 33
programme.desc: Marie Winter and her gang drug Bea. Erica decides to have Bea brought back to Wentworth.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 34
programme.desc: Margo's terror campaign continues, and Gaffney takes over as Top Dog.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 36
programme.desc: Terry finds Bea distraught - but Lizzie and Doreen are convinced she's faking it.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 37
programme.desc: Still unaware of the bet, Vera goes on another date with Terry.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 38
programme.desc: In an attempt to get released, Bea pretends to still have amnesia.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 39
programme.desc: Bea makes a massive sacrifice for Mum, and Vera makes a decision about her future.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 8

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The Earth's orbit has been changed, drawing ever closer to the sun and promising imminent destruction.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Confederacy scout Sgt. Joseph Paradine finds a town full of Union soldiers, and an old man who claims he used witchcraft to paralyze them.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Alan Richards plans to build a dam in Africa on a tribe's ancestral land. The tribe's witch doctor puts a curse on him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Woodrow, a janitor living in the year 1890, accidentally activates a time traveling helmet which transports him to 1962 - then promptly breaks down.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: A hobo, clown, bagpipe player, ballerina and military officer are trapped in a huge cylinder.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: A gung-ho young soldier gets a new viewpoint on war when he inexplicably changes places with a Japanese officer trying to stop his superior from leading a charge against American forces.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 16
programme.desc: A lonely old woman refuses to leave her apartment for fear of meeting "Mr. Death."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Paul Radin has invited three people to join him in his bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 18
programme.desc: A vagrant steps into a murdered gangster's expensive shoes and is taken over by the dead man's ghost, who vows to remain on Earth to seek revenge against his killer.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 19
programme.desc: On a hunting trip, Hyder Simpson and his dog Rip dive into a lake after a raccoon. When he gets home he finds that no one can see or hear him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Actor Rance McGrew makes TV Westerns for a living, but he's a lousy actor and a worse cowboy. Despite that, each week he "wins" against the bad guys. Finally, the bad guys have had enough and decide to teach McGrew a lesson.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 21
programme.desc: The senior residents of Sunnyvale decide that the secret to youth is acting young, and in particular playing a childhood game called "kick-the-can."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 22
programme.desc: Fortune discovers that a piano he bought his wife for her birthday has magical properties - the music that it plays makes people reveal their true essence.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 23
programme.desc: Jeff Myrtlebank comes back to life at his own funeral and soon begins to act very strangely...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 24
programme.desc: The Kanamits, 9-foot tall aliens, arrive on Earth with one lofty goal: To Serve Man.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 25
programme.desc: Old Ben, who is able to transform himself into anything, tries to help a crippled little girl.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 26
programme.desc: Old Ben, who is able to transform himself into anything, tries to help a crippled little girl.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 27
programme.desc: David Gurney wakes up to find that no one - his wife, his co-workers, his best friend, not even his own mother knows him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 28
programme.desc: An astronaut declares himself a god when his ship lands on a planet populated by people smaller than ants.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 29

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 16

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 17

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 18

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 19

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 20

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 21

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 22

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 23

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 24

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 25

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 1

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 2
programme.desc: While Dr. Sloan impatiently waits for Community General to reopen, Caitlin Sweeney resurfaces as a member of R.O.A.R. (Revolutionary Order for Armed Rebellion).

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S6 Ep. 3
programme.desc: It's Cindy Garrett and Philip Kobler's wedding day and they're taking "til death do us part" literally, when they plan the murder of Cindy's father to take place right after their nuptials!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: It is Jess’ 26th birthday party, which bring together new faces and old flames under the same roof

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Joey, Lydia and Debbie head to the local car boot sale to see if they can get any items for Lydia's new shop.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Lauren P, Lauren G and Maria meet for a birthday breakfast. Mark and Mario cross paths at the gym. Mick and Kirk talk women post singles’ night…. Mick reveals he likes Maria.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Maria and Mick finally get friendly over a romantic dinner date. The twins model for Jess and show off their assets. Lucy shows off her curves. And Mario and Mark lock horns.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tension rises with Maria and Gemma over Mick. Mario turns up the heat on Lucy with a proposition but will it all go horribly wrong. Mark and Mario face up once again with Mark having a killer ace up his sleeve.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Gemma and Frankie reveal their body concerns in a moving heart to heart. Joey gives Kirk some interesting fashion tips. And a smashing time is had by all when the twins hold “Greek Night”

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Gemma takes Harry under her wing-mirror as she teaches Harry to drive. No bum notes for Chloe with her first consultation for her bottom implants. And Kirk hosts Karaoke night at the Sugar Hut ……with screaming success!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Joey hosts an unusual cockney/ animal themed party. Mario and Lucy cozy up and there's fun on the slopes!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Cara and Billi get ready for a night out on the town….Kirk and Joey style! Mark woos Sam and Mario show Lucy his Italian side.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Sam gets her feet under the Wright's family table during a cosy Sunday lunch and Arg tackles his body issues full on starting with his gnashers!|Mick and Kirk spend some quality father/son time bonding during a fishing trip.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Lucy wonders whether she’s made a big mistake by giving Mario a free pass. Sam gets a surprise visitor and Mark, Jess, Gemma and Arg head to Boot Camp for fat-busting workouts and some intimate revelations!!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Lydia finds out what happens at Bootcamp doesn’t necessarily stay at Bootcamp. Everyone gets in the ghoulish spirit for Halloween. Nanny Pat goes trick or treating and Sam and Billie host an action packed party.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: It's the morning after the night before and Lauren G and Sam are both reacting to "that kiss"

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: In the season finale: Arg continues his quest for physical perfection and seeks fashion advice from none other than Mr Essex himself, Joey, with "interesting" results!

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 304
programme.desc: The chaos in Cancun continues as Gaz celebrates his birthday in true Geordie style. Charlotte takes her holiday romance to the next level. Vicky erupts as Cancun Chris gets sweet revenge. (S3, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 305
programme.desc: Vicky and Ricci return to the house in time for Becca's birthday which goes off in usual Geordie style. Sophie sends Joel back to England, but it's not long before she regrets the decision. (S3, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 306
programme.desc: An unexpected call means James has to choose between his best mates and Holly. Gary has another threesome and a night out trying to forget about Gary ends in disaster for Charlotte. (S3, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 307
programme.desc: The boy-girl divide returns! Charlotte and Gaz aren't speaking, Becca and Jay are continually arguing, while Holly and James' nurse-patient relationship is back to strictly professional. (S3, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 308
programme.desc: It's the final few days of spring break and the house is rocked by the loss of yet another member. In the last hours, to the disbelief of everyone, Ricci plans his proposal to Vicky. (S3, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 401
programme.desc: After a fun filled summer in Cancun the Geordie Shore gang are back with a bang! With two new spaces in the house, it can only mean one thing, fresh meat for the family!

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 402
programme.desc: The gang throw Ricci and Vicky an engagement party to remember. There'll be booze and banter aplenty, but it turns into a night that everyone will remember for all the wrong reasons.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 403
programme.desc: With Ricci and Sophie having been asked to leave the house, the rest of the Geordie Shore gang decide a road trip to Liverpool is in order to check out the clubs and talent.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 404
programme.desc: The Geordie Shore house is a far from happy place with Vicky and Sophie still not talking and the rest of the house caught in the divide... it's stormy seas ahead at the Shore.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 405
programme.desc: Peace has finally been restored in the house now that Vicky and Sophie have made up, but nothing lasts forever and when Ricci sees red on a family night out, disaster strikes.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 406
programme.desc: It's James' birthday and the gang plan a surprise trip to Dublin to celebrate with a secret guest, but on their return their high is brought down by Ricci's return with some bad news.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 407
programme.desc: With Ricci gone from the Geordie Shore house, the rest of the gang are determined to keep Vicky's spirits up and the boys decide that what better way than a walk on the wild side - camping!

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 408
programme.desc: It's all coming to an end in the house with some keener to leave than others. Before they pack their bags, there's time for a big bash, Geordie style, and it seems like love is all around.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 406
programme.desc: Pauly D and Vinny put on a Guido-themed comedy show, while Ron and Sammi try to patch things up. Snooki is so distraught over her long-distance relationship that JWOWW and Sammi decide to intervene.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 407
programme.desc: S4, Ep 7. When the roommates take a trip to the Italian Shore, Snooki & Deena party so hard they wind up in bed together. Whilst back in Florence, Team Meatball has a run-in with the Italian police.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 408
programme.desc: The boys spring Team Meatball from the police station after their accident. And when Snooki's boyfriend Jionni comes to visit, a romantic evening ends with Snooki sobbing alone on the street.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 409
programme.desc: Deena panics after missing her period. After an all-night fight with Jionni, Snookie decides to take a break from the relationship. Mike tries to win her over, but someone else ends up comforting her.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 410
programme.desc: After Mike's prank backfires, the guys visit Vinny's family in Sicily and the girls class it up on a Tuscan wine tour. Snooki learns the truth about her hook-up with Vin and must come clean to Jionni.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 411
programme.desc: Deena's still trying to 'do sex' with Pauly, the meatballs get an icy reception at a club, and the whole house turns on Mike after he stirs up drama one too many times. (S4, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 412
programme.desc: Mike's antics have proven too much and Ron demands he make amends. As the crew count down the days until their return to Seaside, Mike wonders whether or not to join them at the Shore. (S4, ep12)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 453
programme.desc: After a summer full of popping and breaking bottles, heartache, hookups, and car-crashing, wall-smashing drama, the cast reunite to open up old wounds and say goodbye to Florence.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 501
programme.desc: The roommates return from Italy and couldn't be more excited to get back to the Jersey Shore. But a drama storm is brewing as Mike threatens to destroy Snooki's relationship with Jionni. (S5, ep1)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S5 Ep. 502
